CVE-2020-9633.title: Adobe Flash Player Desktop Runtime 32.0.0.371 and earlier, Adobe  ...
CVE-2020-9633.summary: Adobe Flash Player Desktop Runtime 32.0.0.371 and earlier, Adobe Flash Player for Google Chrome 32.0.0.371 and earlier, and Adobe Flash Player for Microsoft Edge and Internet Explorer 32.0.0.330 and earlier have an use after free vulnerability. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution.

CVE-2020-9746.title: Adobe Flash Player version 32.0.0.433 (and earlier) are affected  ...
CVE-2020-9746.summary: Adobe Flash Player version 32.0.0.433 (and earlier) are affected by an exploitable NULL pointer dereference vulnerability that could result in a crash and arbitrary code execution. Exploitation of this issue requires an attacker to insert malicious strings in an HTTP response that is by default delivered over TLS/SSL.
